zh.lifeSummary: Cissil Buchill是Sir Humphrey Buchill的女兒，出生。她和Howel Madog至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Cissil Buchill是Sir Humphrey Buchill的女儿，出生。她和Howel Madog至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Buchill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and Somerset): variant of   Burchell  .

variants.name: Burchell
meanings: English: habitational name from Birchill in Derbyshire or Birchills in Staffordshire, both named in Old English with birce ‘birch’ + hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Cissil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Cecilia   or   Cicely  , which has sometimes been used as an independent given name in recent decades.

variants.name: Cecilia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

en.lifeSummary: Cissil Buchill was born as the daughter of Sir Humphrey Buchill. She had at least 1 son with Howel Madog.

fr.lifeSummary: Cissil Buchill est née, fille de Sir Humphrey Buchill. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Howel Madog.

de.lifeSummary: Cissil Buchill wurde, als Tochter von Sir Humphrey Buchill geboren. Sie hatte mit Howel Madog mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Cissil Buchill è nata il come figlia di Sir Humphrey Buchill. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Howel Madog.

ja.lifeSummary: Cissil BuchillはSir Humphrey Buchillの娘として生まれた。彼女はHowel Madogとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Cissil Buchill(은)는 Sir Humphrey Buchill의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Howel Madog(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Cissil Buchill nasceu filha de Sir Humphrey Buchill. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Howel Madog.

ru.lifeSummary: Cissil Buchill родилась. Её отца звали Sir Humphrey Buchill. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Howel Madog.

es.lifeSummary: Cissil Buchill nació como hija de Sir Humphrey Buchill. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Howel Madog.
